title: Hotel Guest Check-Out Process
trigger: Guest requests to check out or reaches scheduled departure date.

steps.title: Greet Guest and Confirm Departure
steps.action: The front desk agent greets the guest warmly and confirms their departure date and time. Verify any special requests or transportation needs.

steps.title: Review Guest Folio
steps.action: Access the guest's folio in the PMS to review all charges, including room rate, F&B, and any additional services. Ensure all charges are accurate and complete.

steps.title: Resolve Billing Discrepancies
steps.action: Discuss any discrepancies with the guest and resolve them promptly. Adjust the folio as necessary and update the PMS.

steps.title: Process Payment
steps.action: Request payment from the guest. Accept payment via credit card, cash, or other accepted methods. Ensure PCI-DSS compliance during the transaction.

steps.title: Finalize Check-Out
steps.action: Print or email the final invoice to the guest. Confirm the guest's contact information for future correspondence and loyalty programs.

steps.title: Update Room Status
steps.action: Update the room status in the PMS to 'vacant' and notify housekeeping to prepare the room for the next guest.

steps.title: Offer Farewell and Assistance
steps.action: Thank the guest for their stay and offer assistance with luggage or transportation. Provide feedback forms or encourage online reviews.

description: This playbook outlines the standard operating procedures for the guest check-out process at hotels in Egypt. It ensures a smooth and efficient departure experience, maintaining high guest satisfaction and operational excellence.
